title: 2026 04 05 HackerNews
content: NASA released the first high‑resolution Earth photos from Artemis II, captured by a Nikon D5 aboard the spacecraft, showing the Atlantic, auroras and the day‑night terminator. A controversy erupted when author Sarah Wynn‑Williams was barred from criticizing Meta under a non‑defamation clause, a restriction that paradoxically boosted book sales. The FAA’s 21‑month drone ban near ICE vehicles faced EFF criticism for infringing free‑speech and due process rights. A new self‑distillation method improved large‑language‑model code generation. Other items: Oracle’s simultaneous mass layoffs and H‑1B filings, Y Combinator expelling Delve for fraud and license violations, iNaturalist’s citizen‑science platform, Germany’s military‑permit rule for men abroad, an AI‑discovered 23‑year‑old Linux NFS bug, and MVIDIA’s educational game to build CPUs.

title: 一款开箱即用的 Spring Boot 4 DDD 工程脚手架，适合 AI 初始化项目参考
content:
一个开箱即用的 DDD （领域驱动设计）工程脚手架，基于 Spring Boot 4.0.1 和 Java 21 花时间精心打造了 Spring boot 脚手架，使用较新的框架和 JDK 。自己用了这段时间感觉不错。尤其是让 AI 生成项目时，有了参考，AI 便知道要按什么规则去搭建了，而不是笼统地说按照 DDD 结构初始化项目。

Springboot4DDD 是一个生产就绪的 DDD 工程脚手架，帮助开发者快速搭建符合领域驱动设计原则的企业级应用。

源码地址：https://github.com/microwind/design…

content: China will launch the print edition of the internationally oriented scientific journal *Vita* in June. The journal, aimed at life sciences and biomedicine, is positioned against top global journals and will be freely open access to researchers worldwide. The open‑access policy addresses the conflict between the desire for knowledge sharing and rising article‑processing charges in academic publishing, which some scientists find unaffordable.

title: 2026 年人工智能与数据科学的五大趋势
content: In 2026, AI and data science shift from experimental hype to practical, large‑scale deployment. Five trends emerge: 1) enterprises move beyond pilot projects to integrate AI into core processes, supported by mature MLOps and rigorous ROI metrics. 2) Agentic AI takes center stage, executing tasks autonomously and collaborating across teams, easing human supervision. 3) Data strategy pivots to quality over quantity, with synthetic and “small data” techniques driving vertical breakthroughs. 4) Responsible AI governance—regulatory compliance, explainability, and IP management—becomes competitive core. 5) Talent focus shifts from hiring to reskilling, creating new roles and democratizing AI tools for business users.

title: Claude 封杀 OpenClaw
content: Anthropic has officially banned third‑party access via OpenClaw, ending support for external harnesses. Users who try to connect through OpenClaw will face additional token‑based charges, effectively making the service unusable via those tools. Claude’s subscription fees will now apply only to the company’s own website, app, or official SDKs. Anthropic cited excessive usage and “token arbitrage” by third‑party proxies as reasons for the action, sparking a backlash from developers.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 界面

title: 浙江 11 个市副市长，出任「吴越杯」参赛队领队
content: In April 2026, Zhejiang Province launched its first “Wuyue Cup” city‑football league. The league features 627 grassroots players, about 75% of whom are local residents, and prohibits signing high‑salary professional athletes. Eleven sub‑prefectural cities provide deputy mayors—each responsible for sports—to serve as team leaders for their respective clubs; several were not new to the role. City officials attended the opening ceremony. The competition runs through mid‑June, with a regular season followed by a knockout stage for the top eight teams.

title: DeepSeek V4 优先支持国产 AI 芯片：巨头已开始提前抢货
content: DeepSeek’s upcoming V4 language model prioritizes domestic AI chips, notably Huawei’s and Cambricon’s. The company has rewritten and tested its core code with these partners, and will release two V4 derivatives based on Chinese chip designs. Major Chinese cloud providers—Alibaba, ByteDance, and Tencent—have already preordered hundreds of thousands of Huawei’s new chips to support the launch. This focus marks a shift away from U.S. chip testing, positioning DeepSeek among the top AI applications in China.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 格隆汇

title: 发布仅 1 天 阿里千问 3.6-Plus 冲上 OpenRouter 榜首
content: Alibaba released Qwen 3.6‑Plus on April 2, 2026, a large‑language model with a one‑million‑token context window and claimed to be the strongest Chinese programming model. Within a day it topped OpenRouter’s daily leaderboard, surpassing 1.4 trillion tokens in a single day and breaking the platform’s single‑model record. The model achieved a top spot in Arena’s programming sub‑ranking, putting Alibaba as the second‑highest global AI organization in that metric. After launch on OpenRouter, usage rose 711 % and the model was priced below Claude. It is now available on Alibaba Cloud’s Baian platform, with plans to open source additional sizes and release a flagship Qwen 3.6‑Max.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 站长之家

49岁华人女子被外国客户勒死在家中，凶手不到3年就出狱，回国开店当老板


有人说，人世间的喜剧总是相通的，而悲剧呢，各有各的苦法。但今天要聊的这个悲剧，苦得让人有点喘不过气，更让人愤怒。 最近，一个几年前引起巨大争议的案子，又浮出水面了。案子的受害者，是一名在澳大利亚从事性服务工作的华人女士。她在工作中，被一个德国来的客户活活掐死。可你猜施暴者被判了多久？ 5年。 而且实际上，他只蹲了2年半的监狱，就被放出来了。 你没听错，一条人命，两年半。这件事当年就炸了锅…

title: Gemma 4 发布当天我注册了 gemma4.app，昨天上线，记录一下
content: I registered gemma4.app on the day Gemma 4 was released and released a basic version yesterday. The site now shows GSC exposure. Features added: a trial page for the OpenRouter 26 B Gemma 4 API, a /mobile page with official Android and iOS deployment paths (Google AI Edge Gallery/MediaPipe), and a /download page linking HuggingFace, Kaggle, and Ollama download options. Planned additions include a local deployment generator, prompt comparison tester, and app directory. The mobile version runs Gemma 4 E2B/E4B locally with <1.5 GB RAM, a niche yet underexplored area. Feedback is welcome, especially on mobile deployment.

content: Claude’s extensive bans were triggered by users overloading the system with “crayfish” challenges, generating excessive token spam and straining resources. title: 直面恐惧是最快成长
content: Facing fear is the quickest way to grow. The true “high throw, low pull” strategy exploits market bias: firms undervalued by sentiment eventually have prices return to intrinsic value when they break the bias. Buying cheaply during undervaluation yields about a 70% hit rate, rising to 90% if growth isn’t forecasted. The biggest losses occur after a huge rally followed by a 50% drop, not during undervaluation. Successful investing requires solid logic, assumption of potential error, and protection against worst-case scenarios. Embracing fear exposes opportunities and prevents easy market setbacks.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 酒金岁月
eventKey: 直面恐惧是最快成长
normalizedTitle: 直面恐惧是最快成长
representativeSources: 热帖 - 雪球 - 酒金岁月

content: Meta has appointed former Xiaomi and ByteDance hardware executive Xu Rui to head its newly formed AI hardware team at MSL. Previously, Xu led hardware R&D at Xiaomi (2015‑2017), headed ByteDance’s hardware division (2020‑2022), served as COO at K‑Scale Labs, and product manager at Dreamer before its acquisition by Meta. He brings experience from major Chinese tech firms and recent Meta talent movements.

content: A writer discovered that a former colleague’s digital clone was created from his work data after being laid off. The clone answers questions in the same tone and coding style. To protect workers’ digital identities, an open‑source toolkit was released. It adds style obfuscation, invisible data watermarks, and detection tests to block AI from accurately mimicking employees. The project includes legal guidance and a cyberpunk demo, aiming to prevent post‑exit AI exploitation.

title: Claude 现在可以免费领取一次性额外使用额度了
content: Claude now offers a one‑time free extra usage credit for Pro, Max, and Team subscribers. The credit equals the subscription price: $20 for Pro, $100 for Max 5×, $200 for Max 20×, and $200 for Team. Users must subscribe before 9 a.m. PT on 3 April 2026 and enable “Extra usage.” They claim the credit in settings and on the Usage page; no payment is required. The offer runs from 3–17 April 2026, and the credit lasts 90 days after claiming. The feature is unavailable to Enterprise plans and mobile apps.

title: 为何应静观其变，等待人工智能“大手笔投资”的假起跑期过去
content: Waiting for the initial hype cycle of AI investment to cool gives investors a clearer view of which companies create lasting value. Early “big‑spend” projects often lag behind practical benefits and can mislead markets. By observing how firms progress after the initial rush, stakeholders can better assess real performance, avoid overvaluation, and identify sustainable growth opportunities.
